title: Delhi University Digital Technologies is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Delhi University Digital Technologies is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Delhi University Digital Technologies, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Subject Matter Expert for our Jabalpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Delhi University Digital Technologies:
Delhi University Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Delhi University Digital Technologies!
